data.title: Binance will update leverage and margin for multiple U-margin perpetual contracts
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to the official announcement, Binance Futures will update the leverage and margin tiers of TRUMPUSDT, IPUSDT, VIDTUSDT, COMBOUSDT and NULSUSDTU perpetual contracts at 17:30 (Beijing time) on February 28, 2025. Users' existing positions before the update will be affected, and users are advised to make corresponding preparations before the adjustment. (This newsletter is generated by AI)

data.title: OKX Web3 Wallet Cryptopedia Issue 30 is underway
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News OKX Web3 Wallet Cryptopedia Issue 30 is in progress. From 18:00 on February 21, 2025 to 18:00 on March 7, 2025 (HKT), users who complete the designated tasks of the event will have the opportunity to share the rewards.
It is reported that the WalletConnect network is supported by the WalletConnect Token (WCT) and is an on-chain user experience (UX) ecosystem. Users download or update the OKX App to version 6.78.0 and above, open and switch to the Web3 wallet; after creating or importing a wallet, click "Discover" at the bottom to enter the discovery page, and then select Cryptopedia to enter the 30th WalletConnect interactive area.

data.title: Mirana Ventures is suspected of buying the bottom of ETH, with an average price of $2,134 and a position of 21,667 ETH
data.description: According to the monitoring of the on-chain data analyst "AI Aunt", Mirana Ventures is suspected of buying the bottom of ETH. Six hours ago, the agency recharged $50 million USDT to Falconx, and four hours ago, it withdrew 21,667 ETH, worth $46.25 million, with a position price of about $2,134. At present, all the funds have been recharged into Bybit.

data.title: Mirana Ventures Transfers Significant Funds to Bybit Exchange
data.description: According to PANews, Mirana Ventures recently conducted substantial financial transactions involving cryptocurrency. Six hours ago, the firm deposited $50 million USDT into FalconX. Following this, four hours ago, they withdrew 21,667 ETH, valued at approximately $46.25 million, with an acquisition price of around $2,134 per ETH. These funds have now been entirely transferred to the Bybit exchange.

data.title: Bitcoin Legislation Advances: Arizona Moves Closer to Crypto Reserves
data.description:
Arizona is advancing two key Bitcoin reserve bills, SB 1373 and SB 1025, positioning itself as a leader in state-level cryptocurrency adoption.

The post Bitcoin Legislation Advances: Arizona Moves Closer to Crypto Reserves first appeared on Ecoinimist.

source: https://ecoinimist.com/2025/02/28/arizona-closer-to-bitcoin-reserves/?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=arizona-closer-to-bitcoin-reserves

data.title: A new address withdrew about 96,000 SOL from Binance and pledged all of them to Jito
data.description: Spot On Chain monitoring shows that a newly created wallet address withdrew 96,128 SOL (worth about $12.37 million) from Binance at a price of $128.6 and pledged all of it in Jito. It is worth noting that this address is associated with another whale address, which sold a batch of SOL at a higher price of $140.8 about 3 days ago. These SOLs made a profit of $4.58 million (51% return) after being pledged for one year.

data.title: Upbit NFT adds 5 new collectibles trading and deposit and withdrawal services
data.description: According to the official announcement, UpbitNFT will open trading and deposit/withdrawal services for 5 new collectibles on February 28, 2025, including Pirate Nation-Founder's Pirates (PIRATE), Yawanawa and Refik Anadol's Winds of Yawanawa (YAWANAWA). Users can deposit and withdraw NFTs through registered Metamask. (This newsletter is generated by AI)

data.title: Celestia Founder Proposes Temporary Increase In DA Fees
data.description: According to Odaily, Celestia founder Mustafa Al-Bassam has proposed a temporary fourfold increase in Data Availability (DA) fees. This suggestion was made in a governance forum to test the price discovery of DA fees while maintaining overall costs at a relatively low level, approximately $0.00008 per Rollup transaction.
